title: Sweet & Crispy American Apple Crumble
description: This American apple crumble is a comforting dish featuring sweet and flaky layers with the addition of cranberry juice for a unique twist. Whole30-friendly, its perfect for those on special diets or just looking to enjoy something deliciously different.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into cubes

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Core and slice the apples, leaving them whole.
In a saucepan, combine sugar, cream, cornstarch, lemon juice. Bring to a boil while stirring until thickened. Reduce heat and simmer for about 2 minutes.
Place apple slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil, drizzle with the sweet sauce evenly over apples.
Mix almond flour and oats in a bowl, then sprinkle over apples and butter cubes. Gently press down to adhere.
Bake for 30-35 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream if desired.
